description: secretx-hashicorp-vault/src/lib.rs uses .map(|s| s.to_string()) at approximately lines 155 and 170 when converting &str to String. The idiomatic Rust form is .map(str::to_owned), which is cleaner, avoids the unnecessary closure, and is what clippy::redundant_closure_for_method_calls / clippy::cloned_instead_of_copied would suggest. Low-effort mechanical fix.
title: map(|s| s.to_string()) should be map(str::to_owned) in vault backend
